Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), libcinnamon-desktop-dev (>= 6.6), libcinnamon-menu-3-dev, libcolord-dev, libglib2.0-dev, libgtk-3-dev, libgudev-1.0-dev [linux-any], libmm-glib-dev [linux-any], libnm-dev [linux-any], libnma-dev [linux-any], libnotify-dev, libpolkit-gobject-1-dev, libupower-glib-dev, libwacom-dev [linux-any], libx11-dev, libxi-dev [linux-any], meson
Package-List: cinnamon-control-center deb x11 optional arch=any cinnamon-control-center-data deb x11 optional arch=all libcinnamon-control-center-dev deb libdevel optional arch=any libcinnamon-control-center1 deb libs optional arch=any
